install: bash .cursor/setup-env.sh && (sudo pg_ctlcluster 16 main start || true) && (sudo -u postgres createdb expo-starter 2>/dev/null || true) && pnpm install && pnpm --filter @acme/db db:migrate:prod

terminals.name: web
terminals.description: Next.js web app (port 3000) — hosts tRPC API and Better Auth

terminals.name: server
terminals.description: Express API server (port 3001) — standalone tRPC server with /health endpoint
